steps.title: Recognize the task's scope
steps.content: The task asks for a “historical overview of the Shackleton expedition” — that means covering the expedition's main events from start to finish, not the books, documentaries, or wreck discovery created years later.

steps.title: Apply the scope to the choices
steps.content: Choice A presents the expedition's core events in chronological order — departure in 1914, ship loss amid harrowing sea-ice troubles in 1915, and crew rescue in 1916 — directly providing the historical overview requested. The other choices either focus on secondary sources and post-expedition events (C, D) or misstate the events (B). This matches choice A — A is correct.
